case.title: ALEXANDER v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE

opinion.h: ALEXANDER v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE, 304 U.S. 577 (1938)
Mrs. L. W. ALEXANDER, petitioner, v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE.* No. 989.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Robert Ash, of Washington, D. C., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 304 U.S. 590, 58 S. Ct. 1056, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Alexander v. Commissioner of Internal Revenue 304 US. 577 (1938) ]
